VERIFICATION
============

agentx is open-source. The Windows binary distributed in this Chocolatey
package is the x86_64-pc-windows-msvc artifact built and published by the
official agentx release workflow at:

  https://github.com/agentserver/agentx/blob/main/.github/workflows/release.yml

The artifact, its sha256 checksum, and the source commit it was built from
are all visible on the corresponding GitHub Release page:

  https://github.com/agentserver/agentx/releases

Verification:

  1. Download the same artifact from the GitHub Release directly:
     https://github.com/agentserver/agentx/releases/download/v<version>/agentx-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip
  2. Compute its SHA-256 (Get-FileHash agentx-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip -Algorithm SHA256)
     and compare to the official sha256 published alongside the zip at
     https://github.com/agentserver/agentx/releases/download/v<version>/agentx-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip.sha256
  3. The same sha256 is also recorded in tools\chocolateyinstall.ps1 of this
     Chocolatey package (the value passed to Install-ChocolateyZipPackage).

The package is built and pushed from CI; the workflow run that produced any
given version is visible at https://github.com/agentserver/agentx/actions
under the release tag.

LICENSE
=======

Apache-2.0. See tools\LICENSE.txt.
